tool_args.label: R211 Subway Car Option 1 - 640 Additional Cars
tool_args.raw_text: This modification is for the exercise of a federally funded option to purchase 640 additional subway cars and related non-car items from Kawasaki Rail Car, Inc.

payload.description: Exercise of Option 1 for 640 additional subway cars (R211) from Kawasaki Rail Car, Inc. for $1,782,497,142. Cars will replace R46 fleet on A and C lines, CBTC equipped. Delivery anticipated Feb 2025-Dec 2026.

evidence_refs.source_quote: This modification is for the exercise of a federally funded option to purchase 640 additional subway cars and related non-car items such as spare parts, special tools, diagnostic test equipment, technical documentation, and training for NYC Transit's Department of Subways from Kawasaki Rail Car, Inc. ('Kawasaki') in the estimated amount of $1,782,497,142.
The cars to be purchased under Option 1 will provide replacements for the R46 fleet that runs on the A and C lines.

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA Headquarters is seeking Board approval to modify the existing CH2M Hill New York, Inc. ("CH2M") contract to provide consultant services in support of NYC Transit's New Fare Payment System ("NFPS")

tool_args.label: Scheidt & Bachmann maintenance serves MNR and LIRR
tool_args.raw_text: Scheidt & Bachmann maintenance supports MNR and LIRR ticket selling systems.

payload.description: Scheidt & Bachmann ticket selling system maintenance services Metro-North Railroad and Long Island Rail Road.

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTAHQ is seeking to obtain MTA Board approval for a three-year extension and additional funds of $14,092,392 to an existing miscellaneous service contract with Scheidt & Bachmann

tool_args.label: Total MTA Agency Revenue Passengers August 2022
tool_args.raw_text: Total all agencies revenue passengers in August 2022: 128,355,048 (21.55% increase).

payload.raw_value_text: 128,355,048 total revenue passengers in August 2022, 21.55% increase from 2021

tool_args.label: ULSD Fuel Net Impact 2022-2024
tool_args.raw_text: Net Impact of ULSD fuel hedge for 2022: ($51.599) million unfavorable.

payload.description: Net impact of hedge on ULSD fuel costs vs 2022 Adopted Budget as of October 12, 2022

tool_args.label: R211 Option 1 presented at October 2022 Finance Committee
tool_args.raw_text: R211 Subway Car Option 1 presented to the Finance Committee in October 2022.

payload.description: R211 Subway Car Option 1 was presented as procurement item at October 2022 Finance Committee.

evidence_refs.source_quote: This modification is for the exercise of a federally funded option to purchase 640 additional subway cars

tool_args.label: Kawasaki contracted for R211 base contract
tool_args.raw_text: Kawasaki Rail Car, Inc. contracted for R211 subway cars under Contract R34211.

payload.description: Kawasaki Rail Car, Inc. is the manufacturer under Contract R34211 for R211 subway cars, including Option 1.

evidence_refs.source_quote: In January 2018, the Board authorized the award of Contract R34211 to Kawasaki to design, build, and deliver 535 subway cars
